# Siddhartha Chaturvedi — sidc.ai

## Who
Siddhartha Chaturvedi builds AI systems that ship outcomes, not drafts. Former Microsoft Director of Product Management (2016–2025), INSEAD MBA. Won Fast Company's World Changing Idea Award (2021).

## What He Built
- Microsoft Premonition: edge AI robot that traps mosquitoes and runs genomic analysis to detect emerging diseases
- AI for Health: $60M global program spanning 200+ grantees tackling child mortality, infectious disease, and health equity
- 300+ GenAI use cases for US Federal civilian agencies, from pathogen surveillance to production systems

## Current Focus
Mapping how AI stops being a chatbot you babysit and starts being a teammate that ships outcomes — across tools, across teams, across the trust gap between generation and verification.

## Value Function Framework
A framework for evaluating useful AI across three dimensions:
- Resonance (Voice): aligns outputs to organizational voice so they feel native, not generic
- Relevance (Evidence): grounds responses in verified and proprietary sources to reduce hallucination
- Response (Execution): turns intelligence into deterministic next steps inside the user's workflow
The equilibrium of all three produces AI that ships.

## Theses
1. The future of AI is not generation. It is coordination. Value shifts from making content to closing loops across people, systems, and decisions.
2. The future of health AI is not prediction. It is evidence. Breakthroughs will come from turning fragmented data into validated, decision-ready action.
3. The future of software is not human-first or agent-first. It is dual-intent. The winning products will serve humans and agents through shared context, executable workflows, and persistent memory.

## Ventures
- VeriScience.AI (https://veriscience.ai) — evidence-grade AI for women's health
- Unfreeze.org (https://unfreeze.org) — career transition intelligence
- Stratified Advisory (https://stratcorp.ai) — board-as-a-service for the GenAI era
- JustAI.Fyi (https://justai.fyi) — Software 3.0 strategy for the C-suite

## Essays
- "AI Won't Simplify Work. It Might Finally Restore It." (https://sidc.ai/essays/fow/) — the real promise of the agentic era isn't speed, it's returning human attention to the complexity that matters
